Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Western Macarthur (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Feb-22-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Uncontested Calendar of FEB-21-2002 ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Prove-Up Hearing (Asbestos). Appearance: Anthony Vieira, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff ROBERT FABIANEK and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $216,800.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made.
